decisions.decision: patient_summaries as separate table with UNIQUE constraint on patient_id
decisions.rationale: Supports upsert pattern, cleaner than column on patients table

decisions.decision: Single rationale per supply checklist (not per-item)
decisions.rationale: D-08 locked decision: keeps table compact, rationale is about the overall recommendation

decisions.decision: Summary generation synchronous in pipeline (not async)
decisions.rationale: Demo reliability — async would add complexity with no demo benefit

decisions.decision: Auto-fixed pre-existing type gaps in types.ts
decisions.rationale: Phase 1 migration added columns (confirmed_items, note_id, stable_items, recommended_first_actions) without updating TypeScript interfaces

next_action: Run migration, import n8n workflows, then test all 3 demo scenarios end-to-end. After human verification, proceed to Phase 4 (Real-Time System and UI Overhaul).
context_notes: Phase 3 fully executed and verified (9/9 automated must-haves). Phase marked complete in ROADMAP.md. Next phase is Phase 4 which depends on Phases 1 and 2. Branch is feature/procedure-search. Phase 2 plan 02-02 (ActivityTimeline) is still incomplete — check before starting Phase 4.
